g.aria-label: 1 Normal movement will take the ship(s) into a gas/dust cloud, asteroid field, planetary rings, minefield, warp rift or other dangerous celestial phenomena?

path.aria-label: No special order. Must move into contact and initiate a boarding action if possible.
No special order. If there is a planet on the table, the ship/ squadron must end its movement closer to it of possible. Otherwise move at half speed straight ahead.

g.aria-label: 2 Nearest enemy is in front fire arc and less than 15

path.aria-label: cm away? You can opt to skip this condition if the ship is armed with bio-plasma.

g.aria-label: 3 Nearest enemy is in front fire arc and more than 90
4 Nearest enemy is within rear fire arc? This condition only applies to escort ships.
5 Enemy is in front fire arc and within range/fire arc of operational bio-weapon?
7 None of the above conditions apply?

path.aria-label: DOES THE SHIP MEET THIS CONDITION?

g.aria-label: Burn Retros A turn must be made away from the celestial phenomena.
